content.en:
When Ye Tian hit the first layer of the Dacheng realm of the Jiaye Wisdom Body, the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce ushered in an incomparably distinguished guest.

Jiucai Chamber of Commerce Headquarters.

At this time, the president of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, the peak of the fourth realm, the superdimensional realm, the Lord of the Six Shadows Realm, was standing respectfully in front of a young man.

This young man's aura didn't seem to be intimidating, but the Six Shadows Realm Lord knew very well that this person in front of him was an extremely terrifying Fourth Realm peak powerhouse, and his strength far surpassed him.

The other party was a fourth-realm pinnacle-level existence from the Four Thousand Realm, and it came from a huge force.

"I've seen the Treasure Worm Realm Lord!"

The Six Shadows Realm Lord said respectfully.

He knew very well that the Treasure Worm Realm Lord in front of him seemed to be very kind, but he was an unscrupulous Lord, and there were many people who died in the fourth realm of the other party.

Even if he relied on the big array of the "830" meeting of the Nine Color Merchants, he was not sure to contend with the other party.

"Six Shadow Realm Lord, I heard that your Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce has obtained the Duowei Treasure Gourd?"

The Treasure Worm Realm Lord asked.

The Lord of the Six Shadows Realm has long had this guess in his heart, the Lord of the Treasure Worm Realm must have come for this, but why did the Lord of the Treasure Realm come so quickly?

They had already blocked the news, and all the Fourth Realm Extradimensional Realms were not allowed to enter the Four Thousand Realm, as long as he delayed time, with the Duowei Treasure Gourd, he was expected to break through to the top Fourth Realm.

When the time comes, even the Treasure Worm Realm Lord will not necessarily be his opponent.

But the Lord of the Treasure Realm came too quickly, and he didn't give them time to prepare at all!

These fourth realms of them will definitely not leak the news, otherwise it will be detrimental to themselves.

Then there is only one possibility, it must be leaked by those extradimensional creatures.

For example, the extradimensional elf clan, if this clan wants to enter the territory of the four thousand, it is not difficult, if it wants to pass on the news, it can also be done.

"Damn it!"

He cursed in his heart.

But at this moment, the Lord of the Treasure Snake Realm is also here, and he can't change the reality.

"Treasure Realm Lord, that Duowei Treasure Gourd doesn't completely belong to our Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, our Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce only has the right to use it!" said the Six Shadows Realm Lord.

"Lord of the Six Shadows Realm, give you time, gather the fourth realm superdimensional realm of other forces, discuss, and hand over a multidimensional treasure, in this case, I can protect you on behalf of Hatoyama. The Treasure Crab Realm Lord said.

The reason why he didn't ask for two multi-dimensional treasures was that he was not stupid, once he asked for two multi-dimensional treasures, these forces would definitely not give them!

Those Fourth Realms will even sacrifice their own forces and flee directly.

In that case, he wouldn't be sure to find those Fourth Realms, and he would completely lose the Duowei Treasure.

It's better to just ask for a multi-dimensional treasure and leave a multi-dimensional treasure for them.

In that case, they will most likely agree.

The Lord of the Six Shadows Realm was emotional, knowing that he could not offend the Lord of the Treasure Realm, so he had no choice but to contact the Immortal Ancient Sect and the Fourth Realm of the Multidimensional Realm of Rivers and Mountains, and explained the situation.

Immortal Ancient Sect.

The Silver Armor Realm Lord at the peak of the Fourth Realm was very annoyed, they snatched two Duowei Treasure Gourds, but this Treasure Treasure Realm Lord from Hatoyama came to pick peaches and wanted to take a Multidimensional Treasure Gourd for nothing, this behavior was too hateful.

But as soon as he thought of the rumored strength of the Treasure Worm Realm Lord, he was distressed.

In terms of strength, he is far inferior to the Treasure Worm Realm Lord, even if all the Fourth Realms join forces, he may not be able to compete with the Treasure Worm Realm Lord.

And behind the Lord of the Treasure Clan, there is an even more terrifying Hatoyama, Hatoyama is a force that exists in the Fifth Realm!

Abandon the Immortal Ancient Sect and flee with the Duowei Treasure Gourd?

If he hadn't been in a desperate situation, he wouldn't have taken this step.

And these extra-dimensional forces also have a multi-dimensional treasure, even if the growth rate is slower, but there is still hope to rise.

After thinking about it, he decided to hand over a multi-dimensional treasure gourd.

Soon after, a group of Fourth Realms gathered at the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce and brought a multi-dimensional treasure gourd.

......

The Lord of the Six Shadows Realm handed a multi-dimensional treasure to the Lord of the Treasure Clan.

The Treasure Worm Realm Lord looked at this multi-dimensional treasure gourd and was slightly disappointed: "It's a pity, it's just a quasi-innate multi-dimensional supreme treasure level multi-dimensional treasure gourd, and it can only raise my treasure elephant body to the second layer of the Dacheng Limit Realm! If it is a true complete innate multi-dimensional supreme treasure level, then I can easily raise my treasure elephant body to the third layer of the Dacheng Extreme Realm!"

A true innate multi-dimensional treasure!

If it is really this level, where will it be the turn to get the treasure crab realm master, there will definitely be a fifth realm...........

Of course, they didn't speak, they just complained in their hearts.

"Okay, this Duowei Treasure Treasure is mine, this token is given to you, if there are still forces that come to trouble you, I will sacrifice this token!" said the Treasure Crab Realm Lord.

"Thank you, Treasure Realm Lord!"

The Six Shadow Realm Lords and Silver Armor Realm Lords thanked one after another.

Wow!

The Treasure Crab Realm Lord laughed and left.

It wasn't until a while after the Treasure Worm Realm Lord had left that these Fourth Realm people dared to show their anger.

"The Lord of the Treasure Snake Realm is too hateful!"

A Fourth Realm said angrily.

"If you can't deal with him, you must kill him!"

"Forget it, after all, he is from Hatoyama, and that is a force with the fifth realm of transcendent realm, we can't afford to offend!"

"I wonder if the Lord of the Newspaper Realm will snatch the two multi-dimensional treasures of the extradimensional creature clan?"

"There is a high probability that they will not snatch it, there is a high probability that the two multi-dimensional treasure gourds are in the Fog Mother Fruit of the Super Dimensional Elf Clan, the position of the Super Dimensional Elf Clan is very special, and it has the protection of the Fog Mother Wood, with the large array, even the fifth realm cannot be attacked. Even if the Treasure Elephant Body of the Treasure Worm Realm Lord was raised to the limit of the second layer of Dacheng, it would only be comparable to the weakest Fifth Realm, and it would still be helpless against the Extradimensional Elf Clan, and there would even be a risk of falling. The Lord of the Treasure Worm Realm is very cruel, but he is also very life-sparing, and it is impossible to take risks. "

"Yes, he's already got a multi-dimensional treasure, there's no need to risk another 2.3 to snatch one. "

"Damn, he's bullying us and we don't have hole cards, so we can't keep Duowei Baohu!"

......

In fact, just as they guessed, after the Treasure Frog Realm Lord obtained this multi-dimensional treasure gourd, he didn't go to the extra-dimensional elf clan to ask for a multi-dimensional treasure gourd at all.

He left the 5,000 Territory directly, broke through the boundary extradimensional barrier, and returned to the 4,000 Territory.

Time flies.

After these overlord-level extradimensional forces lost a multi-dimensional treasure gourd, there was only one multi-dimensional treasure left, and they hid this multi-dimensional treasure in a secret place, and never moved, only nourishing the multi-dimensional treasure essence there.

Before you know it, more than 300 extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Ka Ye wisdom body is about to usher in a breakthrough.
